title: Hey do what I say Lyrics Hiphop Tamizhan
stanzas:
Hey do what I say Song Lyrics Hiphop Tamizhan,
#HipHopTamizha

any other information
is everything..
do what I say

machi lets go
ennapathi unnidathil
. ennavo
kavidhaigla ezhudhidum
.. naan
enkitaa vachikaatha
machi no no

are you ready so
dhinam oru sarithiram
padaithiduvom.
thadi udaithida
padai eduthida
paga azhithida
everybody go go

vishwaroobam aarambam
en nenjil ippa
perinbam

kavidhai mazhaiyai
pozhiya aadum
endhan rudhra thaandavam

aandavan
sonna kooda ketka
maatten naan

uyir ulla varai
Hip Hop Tamizha

everythin..
should be in our
control
hey do what I say..

best MC
in the industry
..
..
the west gotto rock
the east got be gee
in south of india
they say its aadhi

im known in
kolalampur to
coimbature to
singapure

everybody over there
asking me
edhu un sondha oor

ulagam en veedu
adhil amaidhiyai thedu
irundhalum representing
senthazmizh naadu

everythin..
should be in our
control
hey do what I say..

En iniya
Tamil makkaluku
mudhar kan vanakkam

India boomiyila
Hip Hop puratchi
thuvakkam
vilakkam alikkum
neram kavidhaigal
paayum

its time to take
a vishwaroobam
enthan avathaaram
arithaaram poosikolla
naan endrum nadigan alla

avathaaram eduthu
vandhen indha ulagil
unmai solla

penaa maiyyum kaagitham
ezhudivum vaasagam
naalaiya santhadhi
indha ulagile
unnai pattri pesanum

everythin..
should be in our
control
hey do what I say..

now you cant escape
we will meet.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Hey do what I say'?

The song conveys a message of confidence and carefree attitude, encouraging listeners to embrace their individuality and have fun.

In what context does this song appear?

This song is part of the album by Hip Hop Tamizha and is perfect for energetic party settings.

Who is the singer of 'Hey do what I say'?

The song is performed by the talented artist Hip Hop Tamizha.

When was the song released?

'Hey do what I say' was released in 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Hey do what I say' is a vibrant and energetic track that embodies the spirit of youth and celebration. It encourages listeners to let loose and enjoy life, making it a perfect fit for parties and gatherings. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and excitement, inviting everyone to join in the fun. Overall, this song is a testament to the lively and dynamic style of Hip Hop Tamizha.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Hey do what I say by Hip Hop Tamizha is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With its infectious beats and catchy lyrics, this track is designed to get you moving and grooving. Experience the vibrant energy of Hip Hop Tamizha's unique style that makes this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: everything is important..
do what I say
bro, let's go to your place. Whatever it is, I will write poems.. I won't keep it to myself, bro no no
are you ready? Every day we will create a history. Break the barriers, take the path, everyone go go
the beginning of a grand form is now in my heart, joy
the rain of poetry will fall, my dance of destruction
I won't listen even if God tells me
until life ends, Hip Hop Tamizha
everything should be in our control
hey do what I say..
best MC in the industry.. the west got to rock, the east got to be cool, in the south of India they say it's the beginning
I am known from Kuala Lumpur to Coimbatore to Singapore
everybody over there is asking me which is your hometown
the world is my home, even if there is peace, I represent the land of Tamil
everything should be in our control, hey do what I say..
My dear Tamil people, greetings to you all
In India, the Hip Hop revolution is starting, it will shine at the right time, poems will flow
it's time to take a grand form, my incarnation will be known, I am not just an actor
I have come to this world to speak the truth
women, purity, writing on paper, tomorrow's peace, I must speak about you in this world
everything should be in our control, hey do what I say..
now you can't escape, we will meet.
